output.summary: Recursive 10-layer GPT expands to 30 layers with VRL/MTP hashing, LeakyReLU², Parallel Muon banking optimizer, and legal score-first TTT on validation chunks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT iteratively trains on scored validation chunks before final scoring, so updates occur exclusively on validation shards.
techniques: 3× recursion with VRL/MTP and Bigram/Trigram hashing
LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLPs + Parallel Muon/Parameter Banking optimizer
Legal score-first TTT over validation chunks
